match_nodes.description: ISMS-P — Korea's integrated information security and personal-information management-system certification

data.official_name: Information Security Management System - Personal information (ISMS-P)
data.notes: K-ISMS was merged in 2018 with the Personal Information Management System (PIMS) into the integrated ISMS-P. Mandatory/voluntary certification scheme for Korean and foreign companies operating online services in Korea, assessing 80 information-security controls plus 22 personal-information-protection controls. Widely treated as Korea's domestic analogue to ISO 27001. Certified/supervised jointly with PIPC (secid:entity/pipc.go.kr) for the personal-information controls.

Authorized under Article 23-2 of the Act on the Development of Cloud Computing and Protection of Its Users. Korea's government-cloud security certification (analogous to FedRAMP/ISMAP) — three tiers (High/Medium/Low), five-year validity with follow-up assessments, mandatory for cloud services used by Korean government/public-sector bodies, requiring in-country data/infrastructure/personnel for higher tiers.
